tagline: Deployment jobs are now available in Public Preview.
what_it_does: Deployment jobs are now available in Public Preview. Deployment jobs allow you to automate tasks like evaluation, approval, and deployment whenever a new model version is created, integrating seamlessly with Unity Catalog models and Lakeflow Jobs. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: These jobs simplify the setup of model deployment pipelines, incorporate human in the loop approvals, and provide governed workflows with clear visibility into progress and historical context for each model version.
plain_summary: Deployment jobs are now available in Public Preview. Deployment jobs allow you to automate tasks like evaluation, approval, and deployment whenever a new model version is created, integrating seamlessly with Unity Catalog models and Lakeflow Jobs.
